SEARCH
Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model

Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.GameManager
public class GameManager extends Object
Class GameManager Description: This class manages the lifecycle of games. It is responsible for creating, joining, starting, and deleting games.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

    Constructor for the GameManager class.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    createGame(int numOfPlayers, String username, int clientID)
    Creates a new game and returns its ID.

    Deletes a game from the game list.

    Retrieves the list of game IDs.

    Retrieves the game list.

    joinGame(String nick, int idGame, int clientID)
    Adds a new player to an existing game.

    Starts a game by setting up its field.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameManager

      public GameManager()
      Constructor for the GameManager class. Initializes the game list and the first available game ID.

  • Method Details

    • createGame

      public int createGame(int numOfPlayers, String username, int clientID)
      Creates a new game and returns its ID.
      Parameters:
      numOfPlayers - The number of players in the new game.
      username - The username of the first player.
      clientID - The client ID of the first player.
      Returns:
      The ID of the newly created game.

    • joinGame

      public void joinGame(String nick, int idGame, int clientID)
      Adds a new player to an existing game.
      Parameters:
      nick - The nickname of the new player.
      idGame - The ID of the game to join.
      clientID - The client ID of the new player.

    • deleteGame

      public void deleteGame(int idGame)
      Deletes a game from the game list.
      Parameters:
      idGame - The ID of the game to be deleted.

    • getGameIDs

      public List<Integer> getGameIDs()
      Retrieves the list of game IDs.
      Returns:
      A list of game IDs.

    • getGameList

      public HashMap<Integer,Game> getGameList()
      Retrieves the game list.
      Returns:
      A map of game IDs to Game objects.

    • startGame

      public void startGame(int gameID)
      Starts a game by setting up its field.
      Parameters:
      gameID - The ID of the game to be started.
